## New community app

- [ ] Added `apps/community/<slug>/app.config.json`
- [ ] **No secrets / URLs / passwords** (the API URL + password are global, never in a config)
- [ ] Valid JSON; `fields` / `row` / `detail` / `actions` / `sort` set
- [ ] Generic and single‑purpose
